scripts.build:apk: next build && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: pnpm run build:apk && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug && cd .. && echo "APK -> android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk"
scripts.apk:release: pnpm run build:apk && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease && cd .. && echo "APK -> android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-unsigned.apk"
